title: War Wither
description: This mod adds a powerful new boss—the "War Wither"—which is stronger and more agile than the standard Wither.
body:
**__This mod adds a powerful new boss—the "War Wither"—which is stronger and more agile than the standard Wither.__**

If configuring settings, the War Wither will replace the Wither spawned via Soul Sand. You can enable/disablethis feature in the configuration settings. When disabled as an independent boss, players can transform a vanilla Wither into the War Wither by using a Nether Star on it (or by adding the warwither:change\_wither\_to\_war\_wither tag).

 Configuration files allow you to adjust the War Wither's attributes and enable/disable damage limitation mechanics.

**[This mod requires Jerotes Warehouse as a prerequisite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jerotes-warehouse).**

![War Wither](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1285170/description_ec41a914-8fe5-4dbe-bd1d-b7b7713a1bb4.png)
